'<t ~. a:rnltlR111, 'llTTl II, ~ 3, d!!-~ (ii) ~ <til.an. 29(31), i11fu9l 7 ~. 2010 ;1\1 ~ctft lit ?.it! 4728 GJ/2010 MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th December, 20 I 0 S.O. 2928(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (I) of Section 3 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, Act, 2006 (27 of2006), read with rule 3 of the National Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Oscar Fernandes, MemberofParliament, Rajya Sabha to be member of the Nationa.l Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises and for the said purpose there shall be no alternation in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises number S.O. 29(E), dated the 7th January, 2010. [F. No. I (6)/2010-NBMSME] MADHAV LAL, Add!. Secy. and Development Commissioner Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 29(E), dated the 7th January, 20 I0.
